_description: DOI-keyed registry of screened and included studies. SOURCE OF TRUTH for the bibliography. Screening/dedup stages append here; literature/bib/*.bib is generated from this via `make bib` and must never be hand-edited. One object per study, keyed by normalized DOI (lowercase, no URL prefix). Use citekey for BibTeX.

studies.title: Pension Policy Reform and Fertility: Micro Evidence from Ghana
